creator: freebsd-bugzillaqarmuxq9@katink.net
text:
The Naxsi module has moved repository.  See details of this move in the original repository here:
https://github.com/nbs-system/naxsi/issues/630

Version 1.4 of Naxsi has also been released under the new repository (https://github.com/wargio/naxsi) and looks to include important compatibility updates (bug #271064, comment #11), among other things.

https://github.com/wargio/naxsi/compare/1.3...1.4
